export const JOBS = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Senior React Developer",
    company: "TechNova Inc.",
    location: "New York, NY",
    type: "Full-time",
    salary: "$120k–$160k",
    category: "Engineering",
    logo: "TN",
    color: "#00D4AA",
    posted: "2 days ago",
    description:
      "Build scalable frontend applications with React 18, TypeScript, and GraphQL. Lead a team of 4 engineers and mentor junior developers. You'll own architecture decisions and work closely with product and design.",
    tags: ["React", "TypeScript", "GraphQL", "AWS"],
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Product Designer",
    company: "Forma Studio",
    location: "Remote",
    type: "Full-time",
    salary: "$90k–$120k",
    category: "Design",
    logo: "FS",
    color: "#6C63FF",
    posted: "1 day ago",
    description:
      "Own end-to-end product design for our SaaS platform. Run user research, prototyping, and ship final designs. You'll collaborate daily with engineering and define the design system from the ground up.",
    tags: ["Figma", "UX Research", "Prototyping", "Design Systems"],
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "Backend Engineer – Node.js",
    company: "CloudBase",
    location: "Austin, TX",
    type: "Full-time",
    salary: "$110k–$145k",
    category: "Engineering",
    logo: "CB",
    color: "#FF6B6B",
    posted: "3 days ago",
    description:
      "Design and implement RESTful and GraphQL APIs powering our data platform. Work with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker. You'll own service reliability and contribute to our microservices migration.",

  {

      "Drive demand generation campaigns, manage a $500k annual budget, and collaborate with the content team. You'll own SEO strategy, paid media channels, and monthly performance reporting.",

  {
    id: 5,

    color: "#4ECDC4",

      "Build predictive models and ML pipelines in a fast-paced research environment. Use Python, PyTorch, and dbt to turn raw data into business intelligence. Partner with the product team to ship ML-powered features.",

  {
    id: 6,

    type: "Contract",
    salary: "$80–$100/hr",
    category: "Engineering",
    logo: "OS",
    color: "#A29BFE",
    posted: "4 days ago",
    description:
      "Manage Kubernetes clusters, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Improve deployment velocity and system observability. 6-month contract with strong potential to go full-time.",
    tags: ["Kubernetes", "AWS", "Terraform", "CI/CD"],
    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    title: "Content Strategist",
    company: "Verve Agency",
    location: "Los Angeles, CA",
    type: "Part-time",
    salary: "$50k–$65k",
    category: "Marketing",
    logo: "VA",
    color: "#FD79A8",
    posted: "6 days ago",
    description:
      "Develop editorial calendars, write long-form content, and collaborate with designers on campaigns. You'll shape brand voice across blog, social, and email — and report on content performance weekly.",
    tags: ["Content Writing", "SEO", "Brand Voice", "Email"],

  {

    color: "#00CEC9",
    posted: "2 days ago",
    description:
      "Ship new features in our Swift codebase, integrate with RESTful APIs, and optimize app performance. You'll work on a consumer app with 2M+ downloads and own the iOS release pipeline.",
    tags: ["Swift", "SwiftUI", "Core Data", "Xcode"],

];

export const CATEGORIES = ["All", "Engineering", "Design", "Marketing", "Data"];

export const TICKER_WORDS = [
